item.title: A Strong Start for Soybeans
item.description: Early soybean planting progress showing field conditions, equipment use, and a promising start to the growing season on the farm.

media:content.media:description: Early soybean planting progress showing field conditions, equipment use, and a promising start to the growing season on the farm.

item.title: It’s Already Done
item.description: A reflective moment on accepting outcomes after events unfold, focusing on moving forward and learning from what has already happened.

item.title: Minnesota Gold Harvest
item.description: A look at golden crop harvesting in Minnesota, showcasing field work, equipment in action, and the beauty of peak harvest season on the farm

media:content.media:title: Minnesota Gold Harvest
media:content.media:description: A look at golden crop harvesting in Minnesota, showcasing field work, equipment in action, and the beauty of peak harvest season on the farm

item.title: New Truck for the Farm
item.description: A look at a new farm truck joining operations, covering features, setup, and how it supports daily agricultural work and hauling needs.

media:content.media:title: New Truck for the Farm
media:content.media:description: A look at a new farm truck joining operations, covering features, setup, and how it supports daily agricultural work and hauling needs.

item.title: A Faster Way to Farm Work
item.description: Exploring efficient farming methods that speed up field tasks, improve workflow, and help complete agricultural operations more quickly.

media:content.media:title: A Faster Way to Farm Work
media:content.media:description: Exploring efficient farming methods that speed up field tasks, improve workflow, and help complete agricultural operations more quickly.

item.title: Do We Need a Whistle on the Farm?
item.description: A lighthearted look at communication and coordination on the farm, exploring whether simple tools like a whistle can improve teamwork.

media:content.media:title: Do We Need a Whistle on the Farm?
media:content.media:description: A lighthearted look at communication and coordination on the farm, exploring whether simple tools like a whistle can improve teamwork.

item.title: Farm Auction Sales Day
item.description: A look at a farm auction event featuring equipment sales, bidding activity, and how agricultural machinery changes hands in the market.

item.title: Taking It Slow on the Farm
item.description: A calm farming day focused on steady field work, careful equipment use, and taking time to complete agricultural tasks properly.

media:content.media:title: Taking It Slow on the Farm

item.title: A Monday on the Farm
item.description: A routine Monday on the farm showing daily tasks, field work, and equipment use as the week begins in agricultural operations.

item.title: It’s the Wrong Ones
item.description: A farm mix-up leads to unexpected results during field work, highlighting problem-solving and adjustments in daily agricultural operations.

media:content.media:title: It’s the Wrong Ones
media:content.media:description: A farm mix-up leads to unexpected results during field work, highlighting problem-solving and adjustments in daily agricultural operations.

item.title: 1998 Truck at 200K Miles
item.description: A look at a 1998 model truck reaching 200,000 miles, covering durability, maintenance history, and real-world farm use.
